component.name: COSMIC ORDER
component.summary: OMARCHY-inspired workflow and aesthetics for COSMIC Desktop

description.p: COSMIC ORDER brings the keyboard-first workflow you love to the desktop you deserve. Manage themes, wallpapers, and screensaver settings from a single native COSMIC application.

ul.li: Theme management with live preview, accent color presets, and import/export
Wallpaper browsing with thumbnail grid, collection filtering, and rotation
Terminal-based screensaver configuration with effects, clock, and timeouts
Power-aware screensaver that adapts to battery state
Caffeine mode to temporarily prevent idle sleep
Tool theme sync — propagate COSMIC colors to Ghostty and other tools

description.p: First public release. Repository moved to jfreed-dev/cosmic-order. Adds community-health files, expanded README attribution, and a project changelog. Internal review notes and pre-release brainstorms removed.
Beta release: dead code removal, clippy pedantic cleanup, pinned dependencies, wallpaper URL download, and overall stabilization.
Phase 8: CLI interface for scripting theme sync, color extraction, and theme switching with JSON output support.
Phase 7A: Native idle detection via ext-idle-notify-v1 Wayland protocol with automatic swayidle fallback and lock-before-suspend via logind.
Phase 6D: Real-time theme propagation with auto-sync on COSMIC theme change and live reload of Ghostty, Neovim, and btop.
Phase 6C: fzf and lazygit theme generators plus a hook system for user-defined custom generators.
Phase 6B: Additional tool theme generators for btop, Neovim (LazyVim), and Zellij with per-tool sync toggles.
Phase 6A: Tool theme synchronization with COSMIC color extraction, colors.toml generation, and Ghostty theme sync.
Phase 5: Polish and integration release with async thumbnails, tooltips, AppStream metadata, and Debian packaging.
